data.name: BlankWorkspace
data.value: { "settings": { "bounds": { "min": [ 0, 0, 0 ], "max": [ 0, 0, 0 ] }, "origin": { "x": -5, "y": 5, "z": 0.01 }, "stock": { "x": 10, "y": 10, "z": 0, "center": { "x": 0, "y": 0, "z": 0 } }, "tools": [ { "id": 1780610382471, "number": 9, "type": "ballmill", "name": "ball 0.8mm", "metric": true, "shaft_diam": 0.8, "shaft_len": 25, "flute_diam": 1, "flute_len": 12, "taper_tip": 0, "order": 0, "taper_angle": 0 }, { "id": 1780610236405, "number": 8, "type": "ballmill", "name": "ball 1/16", "metric": false, "shaft_diam": 0.0625, "shaft_len": 1, "flute_diam": 0.0625, "flute_len": 1.5, { "id": 1780690725110, "number": 14, "type": "endmill", "name": "end 6mm", "metric": true, "shaft_diam": 6, "shaft_len": 50, "flute_diam": 6, "flute_len": 12, "taper_tip": 0, "order": 18, "taper_tip": 0, "order": 19 } ], "device": { "mode": "CAM", "internal": 0, "bedHeight": 2.5, "bedWidth": 300, "bedDepth": 200, "maxHeight": 50, "originCenter": false, "spindleMax": 5000, "gcodePre": [ "G21 ; set units to MM (required)", "G90 ; absolute position mode (required)" ], "gcodePost": [ "M30 ; program end" ], "gcodeDwell": [ "G4 P{time} ; dwell for {time}ms" ], "gcodeSpindle": [ "M3 S{speed} ; spindle speed {speed} RPM." ], "gcodeResetA": [], "gcodeChange": [ "M6 T{tool} ; change tool to '{tool_name}'" ], "gcodeFExt": "nc", "gcodeSpace": true, "gcodeStrip": false, "new": false, "deviceName": "Grbl CNC", "imageURL": "", "useLaser": false, "useIndexed": false }, "process": { "camArcEnabled": false, "camArcResolution": 1, "camArcTolerance": 0.005, "camAreaSpindle": 1000, "camAreaTool": 1000, "camAreaMode": "clear", "camAreaTrace": "none", "camAreaSurface": "linear", "camAreaEdgeOnly": false, "camAreaAngle": 0, "camAreaOver": 0.4, "camAreaDown": 1, "camAreaSpeed": 1000, "camAreaPlunge": 100, "camAreaFollow": 15, "camAreaExpand": 0, "camAreaRefine": 0, "camAreaSmooth": 1, "camAreaShadow": false, "camAreaDogbones": false, "camAreaRevbones": false, "cproc": { "FDM": "default", "SLA": "default", "CAM": "default", "DRAG": "default", "WJET": "default", "WEDM": "default", "LASER": "default" }, "sproc": { "FDM": { "default": { "antiBacklash": 0, "fdmArcEnabled": false, "fdmArcResolution": 1, "fdmArcTolerance": 0.005, "firstLayerBedTemp": 0, "firstLayerBeltBump": 0, "firstLayerBeltLead": 3, "firstLayerBeltFact": 1, "firstLayerBrim": 0, "firstLayerBrimGap": 0, "firstLayerBrimIn": 0, "firstLayerBrimTrig": 0, "firstLayerFanSpeed": 0, "firstLayerFillRate": 35, "firstLayerFlatten": 0, "firstLayerNozzleTemp": 0, "firstLayerRate": 30, "firstLayerYOffset": 0, "firstSliceHeight": 0.25, "outputAlternating": false, "outputAvoidGaps": true, "outputBedTemp": 60, "outputBeltFirst": false, "outputBrimCount": 2, "outputBrimOffset": 2, "outputCoastDist": 0, "outputDraftShield": false, "outputFanLayer": 1, "outputFanSpeed": 255, "outputFeedrate": 50, "outputFillMult": 1.25, "outputFinishrate": 50, "outputInvertX": false, "outputInvertY": false, "outputLayerRetract": false, "outputLoops": 0, "outputMaxFlowrate": 15, "outputMinLayerTime": 10, "outputMinSpeed": 5, "outputPurgeTower": 0, "outputRaft": false, "outputRaftSpacing": 0.2, "outputRetractDist": 1.5, "outputRetractDwell": 20, "outputRetractSpeed": 40, "outputRetractWipe": 0, "outputScarfLength": 0, "outputSeekrate": 80, "outputShellMult": 1.25, "outputShortPoly": 0, "outputSparseMult": 1.25, "outputTemp": 200, "processName": "default", "ranges": [], "sliceAdaptive": false, "sliceAngle": 45, "sliceBottomLayers": 3, "sliceCompInner": 0, "sliceCompOuter": 0, "sliceDetectThin": "basic", "sliceFillAngle": 45, "sliceFillGrow": 0, "sliceFillOverlap": 0.35, "sliceFillRepeat": 1, "sliceFillSparse": 0.25, "sliceFillType": "hex", "sliceFillWidth": 1, "sliceHeight": 0.25, "sliceLayerStart": "last", "sliceLayerStartX": 0, "sliceLayerStartY": 0, "sliceLineWidth": 0, "sliceMinHeight": 0, "sliceShellOrder": "in-out", "sliceShells": 3, "sliceSolidify": false, "sliceSolidMinArea": 1, "sliceSolidMinThick": 0.4, "sliceSupportAngle": 50, "sliceSupportDensity": 0.1, "sliceSupportExtra": 0, "sliceSupportGap": true, "sliceSupportNozzle": 0, "sliceSupportOffset": 1, "sliceSupportOutline": true, "sliceSupportType": "disabled", "sliceSupportTree": false, "sliceTopLayers": 3, "sliceZInterleave": false, "zHopDistance": 0.2 } }, "SLA": { "default": { "processName": "default", "slaSlice": 0.05, "slaShell": 0, "slaOpenTop": false, "slaOpenBase": false, "slaAntiAlias": 1, "slaLayerOff": 0.1, "slaLayerOn": 7, "slaPeelDist": 6, "slaPeelLiftRate": 1.5, "slaPeelDropRate": 3, "slaBaseLayers": 5, "slaBaseOff": 0.1, "slaBaseOn": 30, "slaBasePeelDist": 6, "slaBasePeelLiftRate": 1.5, "slaFillDensity": 0, "slaFillLine": 0.5, "slaFirstOffset": 0, "slaSupportLayers": 0, "slaSupportDensity": 0.1, "slaSupportSize": 0.4, "slaSupportPoints": 4, "slaSupportAngle": 35, "slaSupportGap": 0, "slaSupportEnable": false } }, "CAM": { "default": { "camArcEnabled": false, "camArcResolution": 1, "camArcTolerance": 0.005, "camAreaSpindle": 1000, "camAreaTool": 1000, "camAreaMode": "clear", "camAreaTrace": "none", "camAreaSurface": "linear", "camAreaEdgeOnly": false, "camAreaAngle": 0, "camAreaOver": 0.4, "camAreaDown": 1, "camAreaSpeed": 1000, "camAreaPlunge": 100, "camAreaFollow": 15, "default": { "processName": "default", "ctSliceKerf": 0.1, "ctSliceHeight": 1, "ctSliceHeightMin": 0, "ctSliceSingle": true, "ctOmitInner": false, "ctOutTileSpacing": 1, "ctOutClean": false, "ctOutFilter": 1, "ctOutSmooth": 0.1, "ctOutPower": 100, "ctOutSpeed": 1000, "ctOutGroup": true, "ctOutZColor": false, "ctOutLayer": false, "ctOutMark": false, "ctOutStack": false, "ctOutMerged": false, "ctOriginCenter": true, "ctOriginBounds": false, "outputInvertX": false, "outputInvertY": false, "ctOutInches": false, "ctOutShaper": false } } }, "filter": { "FDM": "Any.Generic.Marlin", "SLA": "Anycubic.Photon", "CAM": "Grbl CNC", "DRAG": "Any.Generic.DragKnife", "WJET": "HydroBLADE", "WEDM": "RackRobo.Betta.Wire.V1", "LASER": "Any.Generic.Laser" }, "cdev": { "FDM": { "mode": "FDM", "internal": 0, "bedHeight": 2.5, "bedWidth": 300, "bedDepth": 175, "bedRound": false, "bedBelt": false, "deviceZMax": 0, "gcodeTime": 1, "maxHeight": 150, "originCenter": false, "gcodeFan": [ "M106 S{fan_speed}" ], "gcodeFeature": [], "gcodeTrack": [], "gcodeLayer": [], "gcodePre": [ "M104 S{temp} T{tool} ; set extruder temperature", "M140 S{bed_temp} T{tool} ; set bed temperature", "G90 ; set absolute positioning mode", "M83 ; set relative positioning for extruder", "M107 ; turn off filament cooling fan", "G28 ; home axes", "G92 X0 Y0 Z0 E0 ; reset all axes positions", "G1 X0 Y0 Z0.25 F180 ; move xy to 0,0 and z 0.25mm over bed", "G92 E0 ; zero the extruded", "M190 S{bed_temp} T{tool} ; wait for bed to reach target temp", "M109 S{temp} T{tool} ; wait for extruder to reach target temp", "G1 E15 F200 ; purge 15mm from extruder", "G92 E0 ; zero the extruded", "G1 F225 ; set feed speed" ], "gcodePost": [ "M107 ; turn off filament cooling fan", "M104 S0 T{tool} ; turn off right extruder", "M140 S0 T{tool} ; turn off bed", "G1 Z{z_max} F1200 ; drop bed", "G28 X0 Y0 ; home XY axes", "M84 ; disable stepper motors" ], "gcodeProc": "", "gcodeChange": [], "gcodeFExt": "gcode", "extruders": [ { "extFilament": 1.75, "extNozzle": 0.4, "extOffsetX": 0, "extOffsetY": 0 }, { "extFilament": 1.75, "extNozzle": 0.4, "extOffsetX": 30, "extOffsetY": 0 } ], "new": false, "deviceName": "Any.Generic.Marlin", "imageURL": "", "fwRetract": false, "filamentSource": "direct", "profiles": [], "extras": {} }, "SLA": { "new": true, "mode": "", "deviceName": "", "imageURL": "", "noclone": false, "internal": 0, "bedWidth": 150, "bedDepth": 150, "bedHeight": 1.5, "maxHeight": 150, "resolutionX": 1600, "resolutionY": 900, "slaFormat": "", "slaFileExt": "", "slaFormatVersion": 1, "slaMachineEditable": false }, "CAM": { "mode": "CAM", "internal": 0, "bedHeight": 2.5, "bedWidth": 300, "bedDepth": 200, "maxHeight": 50, "originCenter": false, "spindleMax": 5000, "gcodePre": [ "G21 ; set units to MM (required)", "G90 ; absolute position mode (required)" ], "gcodePost": [ "M30 ; program end" ], "gcodeDwell": [ "G4 P{time} ; dwell for {time}ms" ], "gcodeSpindle": [ "M3 S{speed} ; spindle speed {speed} RPM." ], "gcodeResetA": [], "gcodeChange": [ "M6 T{tool} ; change tool to '{tool_name}'" ], "gcodeFExt": "nc", "gcodeSpace": true, "gcodeStrip": false, "new": false, "deviceName": "Grbl CNC", "imageURL": "", "useLaser": false, "useIndexed": false }, "LASER": { "new": true, "mode": "", "deviceName": "", "imageURL": "", "internal": 0, "bedWidth": 300, "bedDepth": 200, "bedHeight": 2.5, "maxHeight": 100, "laserMaxPower": 255, "gcodePre": [], "gcodePost": [], "gcodeFExt": "", "gcodeSpace": true, "gcodeLaserOn": [ "M106 S{power}" ], "gcodeLaserOff": [ "M107" ] }, "DRAG": {}, "WJET": {}, "WEDM": {} }, "devices": { "Grbl CNC": { "mode": "CAM", "internal": 0, "bedHeight": 2.5, "bedWidth": 300, "bedDepth": 200, "maxHeight": 50, "originCenter": false, "spindleMax": 5000, "gcodePre": [ "G21 ; set units to MM (required)", "G90 ; absolute position mode (required)" ], "gcodePost": [ "M30 ; program end" ], "gcodeDwell": [ "G4 P{time} ; dwell for {time}ms" ], "gcodeSpindle": [ "M3 S{speed} ; spindle speed {speed} RPM." ], "gcodeResetA": [], "gcodeChange": [ "M6 T{tool} ; change tool to '{tool_name}'" ], "gcodeFExt": "nc", "gcodeSpace": true, "gcodeStrip": false, "new": false, "deviceName": "Grbl CNC", "imageURL": "", "useLaser": false, "useIndexed": false } }, "devproc": { "Any.Generic.Marlin": "default", "Any.Generic.Grbl": "default", "Grbl CNC": "default" }, "controller": { "animesh": "800", "antiAlias": true, "assembly": false, "autoLayout": true, "autoSave": true, "dark": false, "detail": "50", "devel": false, "drawer": false, "edgeangle": 20, "exportOcto": false, "exportPreview": false, "exportThumb": false, "freeLayout": true, "healMesh": false, "lineType": "path", "manifold": false, "ortho": false, "reverseZoom": true, "scrolls": true, "shiny": true, "showOrigin": false, "showRulers": true, "showSpeeds": true, "spaceLayout": 1, "spaceRandoX": false, "threaded": true, "units": "mm", "view": { "left": -0.016266642321755186, "up": 1.1543920013190871, "panX": -4.152188778909738, "panY": 0.7533739635867129, "panZ": -0.2576602259117993, "posX": -5.943046104712695, "posY": 49.446365483075766, "posZ": 109.82648202052755 }, "webGPU": false, "zoomSpeed": 1 }, "hidden": { "fdm-base": true, "fdm-cool": true, "fdm-heat": true, "fdm-fill": true, "fdm-solid": true, "fdm-supp": true, "fdm-xprt": true }, "labels": { "CAM-3-arrows": false, "FDM-3-engage": false, "FDM-3-retract": false, "FDM-3-arrows": false, "FDM-3-move": false }, "synth": {}, "widget": {}, "local": { "model.opacity": 1, "model.edges": false, "cam.anim.trans": true, "cam.anim.model": false, "cam.anim.stock": false, "cam.anim.speed": 3, "kiri-print-seq": 29 }, "mode": "CAM", "id": "3s4x0gm", "ver": 410, "bounds_sel": { "min": [ -33, -27.499900817871094, 0 ], "max": [ 33, 27.499900817871094, 12.699999809265137 ] } }, "version": "4.7.0", "screen": "data:image/png;base64,", "space": { "ver": "WebGL 2.0 (OpenGL ES 3.0 Chromium)", "ven": "WebKit", "glr": "WebKit WebGL", "pla": "Win32", "mob": true }, "work": [], "view": { "left": -0.01626664232175519, "up": 1.1543920013190871, "panX": -4.152188778909738, "panY": 0.7533739635867129, "panZ": -0.2576602259117993, "posX": -5.943046104712695, "posY": 49.446365483075766, "posZ": 109.82648202052755 }, "init": "22", "time": 1782243892391 }
data.comment: Blank workspace.json content for a new CAM project.

data.name: rxGCodeLine
data.comment: Regular expression for reading actions and values on a G-code line.

data.name: rxNumeric
data.comment: Regular expression to extract a numeric value.

data.name: rxSafeHeight
data.comment: Regular expression to extract the safe tool height on a G-code line.

data.name: rxStlVector
data.comment: Regular expression for finding STL vectors.

data.name: rxToolDiameter
data.comment: Regular expression to extract the current tool diameter from a line.

data.name: Syntax
data.value:
Perform tasks on Kiri:Moto files.
Syntax: KiriMotoTools /action:{ActionName} [/configfile:{Filename}] [/infile:{Filename}] [/outfile:{Filename}] [/option:{OptionName[,OptionValue]}] [/properties:{NameValueArray}] [/tool:{SelectedToolName}] [/workingpath:{FolderName}] [/wait] [/?]
All parameters can be prefixed with either '/' or '--'.
* - Actions marked with an asterisk are only supported within a configuration file.
/action - Describes the action to be made. Following are the recognized actions, with associated parameter names. Starred names ('*') are only available in a batch. AutoPocket - Create a pocket operation on the primary shape and automatically select all of the eligible non-through holes. If no tool is selected, #1000 (1/4in end mill) is assumed. /infile /outfile[ /tool] Batch - Perform a batch of file operations from a single JSON configuration file. /configfile CreateCAMProject - Create a CAM CNC project. The input file represents the STL model to load. The output file represents the Kiri project to save. /infile /outfile OptimizeGCode - Optimize a G-code file to reduce wasted effort to a minimum. /infile /outfile Outline - Create an outline operation on the primary shape. If no tool is selected, #1000 (1/4in end mill) is assumed. /infile /outfile[ /tool] ReportGCodeOverlap - Read a g-code file and report overlap on tool paths. /infile
{ActionName} - Name of the action to execute. {Filename} - Fully qualified path and filename. {Foldername} - Fully qualified path.
Example: KiriMotoTools /action:AutoPocket /infile:C:\Temp\MyProject.kmz /outfile:C:\Temp\MyProject.kmz
The above example adds an auto-selected pocket operation to the MyProject.kmz file.
Batch config file variables.
| Name | Command Var | Type | Description | |------|-------------|------|-------------| | Action | /action | SvgActionTypeEnum | The action to be made on the file. | | Actions | (none) | List<SvgActionItem> | Collection of actions to run as a part of this action. | | InputFilename | /infile | string | The path and filename of the input file. | | OutputFilename | /outfile | string | The output path and filename for the operation. | | Properties | List<NameValueItem> | Collection of properties for action. | | Tool | /tool | string | Name of the tool selected for the current operation. | | WorkingPath | /workingpath | string | Working path for current operation. |
